test.template:
Run tests:
!`pytest -v --cov=. --cov-report=term-missing 2>/dev/null || python -m pytest -v --cov=. --cov-report=term-missing`

Analyze failures and suggest fixes.

lint.template:
Run linters:
!`ruff check . 2>/dev/null || echo 'ruff not installed'`
!`mypy . 2>/dev/null || echo 'mypy not installed'`

Fix all issues found.

typecheck.template:
Run type checking:
!`mypy . --strict 2>/dev/null || echo 'mypy not installed'`

Fix all type errors.

review.template:
Review the current Python code for:
- Type hints and mypy compliance
- PEP 8 style
- Async/await correctness
- Error handling
- Performance (vectorization, N+1 queries)
- Security

Suggest specific improvements.
